summary: Workflow: pinned actions (v4, v5), least-privilege permissions, sensible triggers (push/PR/dispatch/schedule), proper job dependency (needs: unit-tests), correct exit-code capture (lines 79-87 set +e pattern). Script: Protocol-based LicenseDB interface for testability, specific exceptions with context, comprehensive type hints, Unix-standard exit codes (0/1/2). Both files show excellent modularity and require minimal maintenance. No issues. Ship as-is.
